articles.title: Climate Change To Force Bitcoin Ban and Carbon Taxes on Crypto Transactions, Says ECB Official
articles.description: A new report from the European Central Bank (ECB) finds that climate change may force carbon taxes on crypto transactions as well as a ban on mining proof-of-work assets like Bitcoin (BTC). articles.title: US Inflation Jumps More than Expected in June; Bitcoin & Ethereum Fluctuate
articles.description: Annual inflation in the US hit 9.1% in June, or more than what analysts had expected, and up from 8.6% in May. It reached the highest level in over 40 years. In a month, prices jumped 1.3%, also more than expected. The so-called annual Core-CPI (consumer price index) – which excludes prices of food and energy - stood at 5.9%....
